examples.name: Manifest Finding Example
examples.description: Shows an Android manifest security finding

data.issue: Exported Content Provider with no permission restriction
data.remediation: Set android:exported="false" unless cross-app access is required.
Move secrets to environment variables or a secrets manager.

examples.name: Web Finding Example
examples.description: Shows a web security configuration finding

data.remediation: Add a strict Content-Security-Policy meta tag or response header.
